prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-GOLDMINIGBEGINNERS-3PC-BUNDLE Product Type: OUTDOOR_LIVING Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor Basic Gold Panning Kit for Beginners, Black 3pc Set (Gold Pan Vial Snifter Bottle) Description: Strike it rich with the ASR Outdoor 3pc Beginner Gold Panning Kit

This complete basic set comes with everything you'll need to sift, grab and contain gold and minerals while out gold panning.

In the kit we've included 1 of our most popular sifting gold pan sizes - 12" diameter. It features dual riffles that will assist you in sifting out minerals and gems from silt and mud.

A few of the other items included are a snifter bottle for easily grabbing small minerals and 1 glass collection vial for containing your gold flake and gem stones once they've been sifted. This is a great kit for beginning gold prospectors. Search Terms: gold mining kit adults beginner panning prospecting equipment classifier screen set outdoor gift for him outdoorsman sifting screen sets metal detector accessories camping Features: - BASIC GOLD PANNING KIT: Ideal for gold panning beginners as an entry level way to get into gold prospecting. Lot of fun to take on camping trips near rivers and streams. - GOLD PAN SPECIFICATIONS: 12" diameter gold pan with dual riffle built into the side wall for washing, sifting raw material alluvial pay dirt - Color: Black made from high impact ABS plastic. Much lighter than traditional gold pans made from metal - GLASS COLLECTION VIAL: 1 1/3 Dram storage container for gold flake and gold nuggets found - SNIFTER BOTTLE: 4oz capacity, also known as a snifter bottle, used to collect found gold out of the basin of your gold pan === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}
